---
title: "Examples"
---

# Examples from `Geometry_astronomy`

These are the selected site assets copied out of the paper-material folders
and kept in a dedicated website asset directory.

## Toy-line comparison panels

![Cropped toy-line comparison strip.](site-assets/toy_case_row1.png)

![Cropped Moffat stress-test strip.](site-assets/moffat_stress_cases_panel_boundary_regions_row1.png)

![Cropped signed emission–absorption ordering strip.](site-assets/signed_emabs_cases_panel_boundary_regions_row1.png)

## IFU kinematic comparison

![Single-galaxy crop from the current kinematic comparison figure.](site-assets/kinematics_col1_full.png)
